title: Carnation
description: Graves designed to minimise bugs, but maximise visual quality
body:
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/skGZIEhx/images/9308ad4fc8c48711a3266c141ec31e8a88d41431.png)
---
### A Fabric mod that adds simple, lag-efficient graves
This mod was made to fix my issue with ugly-looking gravestones, or buggy block-based grave mods. This mod looks good, and functions properly

### ⚠️ AS OF TIME OF WRITING, HAS NOT BEEN TESTED WITH 1.20.2 - 1.20.6 ⚠️

## Gallery
![A Grave in a Cherry Grove](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/skGZIEhx/images/fea13833cae9c1edc2853828a19227cee9a73409.png)
# Current Features
### Graves
- Pick up by standing over them, very simple, good-looking grave entities that are lag efficient
- On death, death coordinates are sent into chat
- Graves glow for ease of seeing
### Gamerules
- `xpSavingPercentage` changes the amount of xp you save in graves on a death, defaults to 50%
- `saveXp` true or false of weather to save xp or not
### Commands
- `/restore <position> <graveUuid>` restores grave contents to the owner, get the uuid by hovering your death message with the coordinates

# FAQ

**Q: Can I port this mod to Forge?**

**A: Yes, but** you must provide credits to me, and I will not answer questions about the Forge port.

**Q: Can I port this mod to Bedrock?**

**A: Yes**, I am fine with you making a version of this mod for Minecraft Bedrock edition.

**Q: Can you backport this mod to 1.x? When will you update to 1.x?**

**A: No.** I mod Minecraft as a hobby with very limited time. Therefore, I will not backport this mod to older versions of Minecraft, and I will update it to future versions when I feel like it. Don't come begging.

**Q: Can I include this mod in a modpack?**

**A: Yes, you can.** Go ahead, don't bother asking. Please, however, provide credit and a link to the Modrinth project page, or, of course, if it's in a modrinth modpack, that's fine, mods are listed on there automatically
